name: suntaskmarcus-design--marcus-linkedin-writer
description: Use this skill whenever Marcus Wang asks to write a LinkedIn post. Triggers include: any mention of 'LinkedIn post', 'write a post', '帖子', 'LinkedIn内容', or requests to create content about solar thermal, OEM manufacturing, European market insights, or B2B sales lessons. This skill contains 5 distinct writing style engines tailored to Marcus's identity as a Solar Thermal OEM Specialist with 15+ years of experience serving 150+ European importers and distributors. Always ask Marcus for a topic/theme and which style he wants — or offer to write all 5 styles at once for comparison.
